texto: I treat my writing life like a fabulous, enchanting lover, because that is what it is to me. Something that is terribly time consuming, delicious and time-stopping. I have missed important meetings for love, and I will continue to put my writing life in the same position. My writing life is the lover at the center, not the neglected cranky demanding millstone, my ball and chain.When you are love, truly and passionately, you don't have to write down in your daily schedule "Spend quality time with Lover today. You can't not.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Heather Sellers: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I treat my writing life like a fabulous, enchanting lover, because that is what it is to me. Some…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiration, inspiracional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e termino.
